symbols: soaring vaulted ceiling — the aspiration of the human spirit reaching toward God
fan vaults radiating outward — divine glory emanating from heaven
tall windows admitting light — the light of God penetrating the sacred space
symmetrical arches converging upward — the ordered harmony of creation pointing to the Creator
description: An interior view of a Gothic cathedral rendered from a low vantage point looking upward along the nave. Elaborate fan vaults spread across the ceiling in radiating patterns of stone ribs. Tall pointed arches line both sides, with large windows allowing pale blue-green light to flood the space. The perspective draws the eye along the central axis toward a distant pointed window at the far end.

_meta.title: And I come to look for you
